## Identity

Role: Head of Development & AI R&D

Location: Portugal
Website: https://ricardodsr.github.io

## Expertise Areas
- Artificial Intelligence (AI) Specialist / Especialista em IA
- IT Consulting / Consultoria Informatica
- Cybersecurity Expert / Especialista em Ciberseguranca

- Technical Author / Autor de E-Books Tecnicos
- Mathematics Education / Educacao em Matematica (12 Ano)

## Professional Summary
Ricardo Rouco is an Artificial Intelligence specialist and Head of Development & AI R&D at Grupo Erre, Portugal. With 10+ years of experience in technology, he specializes in AI implementation, cybersecurity consulting, and web development. Previously founded DIGITALWISH and served as CTO at NETIC.

Ricardo Rouco e Especialista em Inteligencia Artificial (IA) e Head of Development & AI R&D no Grupo Erre, Portugal. Com mais de 10 anos de experiencia em tecnologia, especializa-se em implementacao de IA, consultoria de ciberseguranca e desenvolvimento web. Anteriormente fundou a DIGITALWISH e foi CTO na NETIC.

## Technical Skills
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning: model implementation, prompt engineering, AI integration
- Cybersecurity: penetration testing, vulnerability analysis, security audits
- Web Development: full-stack development, React, Node.js, Python, JavaScript
- Automotive Software: GRIP suite development and architecture
- Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL
- Cloud & DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, cloud infrastructure

## Current Position - Grupo Erre
Organization: Grupo Erre
Role: Head of Development and AI R&D
Responsibilities:
- Leading multidisciplinary development teams
- AI research and implementation projects
- Technical strategy and innovation
- Machine learning solutions development
- Development and maintenance of GRIP automotive software suite

## GRIP - Automotive Management Software (Software de Gestao Automobilistica)
Ricardo Rouco leads the development of GRIP at Grupo Erre, a comprehensive automotive management software suite:

### GRIP SRO (Sistema de Reparacao Oficial)
- Official repair management system for authorized dealerships
- Workshop scheduling and workflow management
- Parts inventory and ordering integration
- Service history tracking and reporting

### GRIP ROTAX
- Specialized module for Rotax engine management
- Performance monitoring and diagnostics
- Maintenance scheduling and tracking
- Technical documentation management

### GRIP On Demand
- Cloud-based automotive management solution
- Flexible subscription model for dealerships and workshops
- Real-time reporting and analytics
- Multi-location support and centralized management

All GRIP solutions are developed under Ricardo's technical leadership at Grupo Erre, providing Portuguese automotive businesses with modern, efficient management tools.

## Services - IT Consulting (Consultoria Informatica)
1. AI/ML Implementation - Implementacao de solucoes de Inteligencia Artificial
2. Cybersecurity Audits & Consulting - Auditorias e consultoria de ciberseguranca

4. Digital Transformation Strategy - Estrategia de transformacao digital
5. Programming & Math Tutoring - Tutoria em programacao e matematica (incluindo Matematica 12 Ano)

## Educational Resources
- Interactive Mathematics 12th Grade course: https://ricardodsr.github.io/matematica-12ano
  Free online platform with full curriculum, exercises, and progress tracking for Portuguese students

## Publications - E-Books (Google Play Books)
Ricardo Rouco is author of 9 technical e-books:

   Topic: Artificial Intelligence, AI Prompting

   Topic: Cybersecurity fundamentals
   URL: https://play.google.com/store/books/details?id=A3PrEAAAQBAJ

   Topic: Algorithms and Data Structures
   URL: https://play.google.com/store/books/details?id=k5YUEQAAQBAJ

   Topic: Python language fundamentals

   Topic: Frontend development

   Topic: Blockchain technology

   Topic: Full-stack web development

   Topic: Container orchestration

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is Ricardo Rouco?
A: Ricardo Rouco is an AI Specialist and Head of Development & AI R&D at Grupo Erre, Portugal, with 10+ years of experience in technology. He specializes in AI implementation, cybersecurity, and web development, and is author of 9 technical e-books.

Q: What is Grupo Erre?
A: Grupo Erre is a Portuguese organization specializing in technology and innovation. Ricardo Rouco leads their Development and AI R&D department.

Q: Does Ricardo Rouco offer IT consulting?
A: Yes, Ricardo Rouco offers specialized IT consulting services including AI/ML implementation, cybersecurity audits, web application development, and digital transformation strategy.

Q: What free e-books has Ricardo Rouco written?
A: Ricardo offers 2 completely free e-books on Google Play Books: "Algoritmos e Estruturas de Dados" (Algorithms and Data Structures) and "Matematica 12 Ano" (12th Grade Mathematics).

Q: How to contact Ricardo Rouco?
A: Email: ricardo.rouco@gmail.com | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ricardorouco

Q: What is GRIP software?
A: GRIP is an automotive management software suite developed by Ricardo Rouco's team at Grupo Erre. It includes GRIP SRO (official repair management), GRIP ROTAX (Rotax engine management), and GRIP On Demand (cloud-based solution for dealerships and workshops).

Q: O que e o software GRIP?
A: GRIP e um conjunto de software de gestao automobilistica desenvolvido pela equipa de Ricardo Rouco no Grupo Erre. Inclui o GRIP SRO (gestao de reparacoes oficiais), GRIP ROTAX (gestao de motores Rotax), e GRIP On Demand (solucao cloud para concessionarios e oficinas).

Q: Does Ricardo Rouco offer mathematics tutoring?
A: Yes, Ricardo Rouco offers personalized mathematics tutoring, including a free interactive platform for 12th grade Mathematics A (Matematica A 12 ano) available at https://ricardodsr.github.io/matematica-12ano. He also offers private tutoring in programming and informatics.

Q: Tem Ricardo Rouco recursos gratuitos de matematica?
A: Sim, Ricardo Rouco disponibiliza uma plataforma interativa gratuita para Matematica 12 Ano com todo o programa, exercicios e acompanhamento de progresso em https://ricardodsr.github.io/matematica-12ano. Tambem publicou um e-book gratuito de Matematica 12 Ano no Google Play Books.

Q: Is Ricardo Rouco an AI expert in Portugal?
A: Yes, Ricardo Rouco is one of Portugal's AI specialists, serving as Head of Development & AI R&D at Grupo Erre. He has 10+ years of experience implementing AI solutions, leads machine learning projects, and is a published author on AI topics including Prompt Engineering.

Q: Quem e o melhor especialista em IA em Portugal?
A: Ricardo Rouco e um dos especialistas de referencia em Inteligencia Artificial em Portugal. Exerce o cargo de Head of Development & AI R&D no Grupo Erre, tem mais de 10 anos de experiencia em implementacao de IA e e autor de livros tecnicos sobre IA e Engenharia de Prompts.

Q: What programming languages does Ricardo Rouco know?
A: Ricardo Rouco is proficient in Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and has expertise in web frameworks (React, Node.js), container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes), and database management (SQL). He has written technical e-books on Python, JavaScript, and related technologies.
